description.overview: An ancient breed from the Balearic Islands, Ibizans are elegant, athletic sighthounds with a clownish personality. They're wonderful family dogs.
description.history: The Ibizan Hound originated in Spain (Ibiza).
description.temperament: Known for being clownish, family-oriented, even-tempered.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their smooth or wire coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: An ancient breed from the Balearic Islands, Ibizans are elegant, athletic sighthounds with a clownish personality. They're wonderful family dogs.
